sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, text_column VARCHAR);
UPDATE test_table SET text_column = 'fizz_buzz' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT regexp_extract(text_column, '([a-z]+)_([a-z]+)', 1) AS first_part FROM test_table;
SELECT regexp_extract(text_column, '([a-z]+)_([a-z]+)', 2) AS second_part FROM test_table;
